text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto isn't feeling well, so I take her to the
infirmary to get some rest.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I pr-promise to rest and get my health back...
Urgh, good night...

text_block_list.name: Delinquent Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Leader Doto, welcome back!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eep?! L-l-leader?! I'm the leader?!

text_block_list.name: Delinquent Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Leader, your hairstyle is off the rails! You've
really styled it up!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: C-could you please stop calling me that?!

Oh! You would disregard my claim to said title...
Have you forgotten your place?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-Opera O?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Try Sin Academy's only big enough for one tyrant!
I hereby challenge you for the throne!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Hyaaagh?! But, but, but why?! Are you asking me
to do something violent?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um... I don't want to battle it out! I'll g-give the
position of leader to you, okay?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh? You stand in the fray of battle desiring
peace... Your kindness knows no bounds!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
...I am smitten with your inner strength! From this
day forward, we are comrades. I shall have it that
we are both leaders!

text_block_list.name: Delinquent Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! Yeaaah!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-what does that mean?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We will rule over this school and make it a place
overflowing with glee. Now come, join me in
laughter, Doto!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: HAAAH HA HA HA!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...Haaaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Hah?! W-wait, did I just—it's not what it sounds
like, I was just having a dream and, and...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-Opera O was there and... Ehehe...

Meisho Doto must have had a good dream. Her
fatigue has been sent packing!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Prepare yourself! The victor of this conflict shall
be decided via a battle of monologues! Let the
"Script Factor" begin!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Desert this place and return nevermore! Begone,
begone, begone!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um... Dessert this place and... never return
more! Be... be... gone... Be gum... B-begun!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Noooo! I can't do it! That wasn't even close to
correct!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Sniff! Even my dreams aren't safe from my slipups...

Meisho Doto's nightmare does nothing to
improve her condition.
